Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The bookshelf is lined with many complex-[n]looking writing composition books...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if any students[n]actually read these...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The bookshelf is lined with many complex-[n]looking writing composition books...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if these are Ms. Toriumi's[n]personal favorites...[n]{f 1 1}
